name: Bacterial Glycerol Stock Preparation

components.name: 1. 挑单克隆 → 接种 3–5 mL LB + 抗性
3. 取 500 µL 菌液 + 500 µL 50% 甘油
components.note: 终浓度 25% 甘油; 或用 15% DMSO

components.name: 5. 标记管子（菌株、质粒、抗性、日期）

notes.en: Mix 500 µL overnight culture + 500 µL 50% glycerol (final 15-25%). Flash-freeze in liquid nitrogen. Store at -80°C for years. Recovery: streak on LB+antibiotic plate from frozen stock.
notes.zh: 复苏：用无菌枪头刮取少量冻存菌（不要完全解冻！），直接划板或接种液体培养基。正确保存可存活 >10 年。做 2 份备份放不同冰箱。甘油需灭菌。标签用防冻标记笔或防冻标签。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning; Addgene Protocol: Making Glycerol Stocks

materials.name: Overnight bacterial culture in LB or 2×YT
Liquid nitrogen or dry ice/ethanol bath

usage.en: Prepare and store long-term bacterial glycerol stocks at −80°C.
usage.zh: 制备细菌甘油保存管，−80°C 长期保存。

briefSteps.en: Pick single colony → grow overnight in LB + antibiotic → mix 500 µL culture with 500 µL 50% glycerol → label tube → snap-freeze → store at −80°C
briefSteps.zh: 挑单克隆 → LB + 抗生素过夜培养 → 500 µL 菌液与 500 µL 50% 甘油混合 → 标记管子 → 速冻 → −80°C 保存

detailedSteps.en: Pick a single colony from a freshly streaked LB agar plate and inoculate into 3–5 mL LB medium supplemented with the appropriate antibiotic.
detailedSteps.zh: 从新鲜划线的 LB 琼脂平板上挑取单克隆，接种至含相应抗生素的 3–5 mL LB 培养基中。

detailedSteps.en: Grow the culture at 37°C, 225 rpm overnight (12–16 h) to late log/early stationary phase (OD₆₀₀ ≈ 0.5–2.0).
detailedSteps.zh: 37°C、225 rpm 振荡过夜培养 12–16 h 至对数晚期/稳定早期（OD₆₀₀ ≈ 0.5–2.0）。

detailedSteps.en: Pipette 500 µL of overnight culture into a labeled 1.5–2 mL cryovial.
detailedSteps.zh: 取 500 µL 过夜菌液加入已标记的 1.5–2 mL 冻存管中。

detailedSteps.en: Add 500 µL of sterile 50% glycerol (final concentration 25% glycerol); mix by gently inverting 5–10 times. Do NOT vortex.
detailedSteps.zh: 加入 500 µL 无菌 50% 甘油（终浓度 25% 甘油），轻柔颠倒混匀 5–10 次，切勿涡旋。

detailedSteps.en: Label the cryovial clearly with: strain name, plasmid name, antibiotic resistance, date, and your initials. Use a cryogenic-resistant marker or label.
detailedSteps.zh: 在冻存管上清晰标注：菌株名称、质粒名称、抗性、日期及操作者缩写，使用防冻标记笔或防冻标签。

detailedSteps.en: Snap-freeze by placing directly into liquid nitrogen for 30–60 s, or on a pre-cooled metal block. Do NOT use a −20°C pre-freeze step as this reduces viability.
detailedSteps.zh: 直接投入液氮速冻 30–60 s，或置于预冷金属架上，切勿先 −20°C 预冻（会降低存活率）。

detailedSteps.en: Transfer immediately to −80°C storage. Prepare at least two independent aliquots and store in separate locations. Stocks are stable for >10 years.
detailedSteps.zh: 立即转移至 −80°C 保存。至少制备 2 管独立备份存放于不同冰箱，正确保存可稳定 >10 年。
